message:
Remove unused admission_now() argument from cancel_entry in executor loop

A second call site in the Executor retry loop still passed
admission_now() to bulkhead.cancel_entry(). This mirrors the fix in
e220ea56 which updated other call sites after the cancel_entry
signature dropped that parameter.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
